title:
Senate - Finance (Room 322)
Senate Finance
Adjourned
2026-02-18 16:51-16:55
full_text: Mr. Chairman, I'll move, I move to remove 2, 3, 4, 204.1 amendment and instead adopt 2, 3, 4, 204.2 amendment. I'm sorry, that's the first motion. Any objection to that motion? I move that we discuss 2, 3, 4, 204.2 then motion, that's all for the moment, for discussion purposes. So, Mr. Chairman, you have an amendment in front of you. Wait, wait, wait, wait, wait. For discussion purposes, Senator Sendo, second, that. We've got to slow down for a later. Okay, now we're on the amendment, tell us about the amendment, Senator Padilla. Thank you, Mr. Chairman. This morning we acted on the reauthorization instrument. And in front of you, you have an amendment that has actually 4 items that were left off of the original bill. And 3 that were in my district and one other one that was found that had also been left off. That's outside of my district, but I'm holding in front of you right now, 3 pieces of paper, 1, 2, 3. There are timestamps here, Mr. Chairman, that demonstrate that these were submitted on time. They simply for whatever reason did I make it into the bill. Any questions on the amendment? Senator Trier. Thank you, Mr. Chair. So just to clarify, there's 4 things being added. Yes? Okay, thank you. So, this was a drafting issue in council that were timestamped in the right time. And council just made the mistake and missed them. Luckily, we hadn't passed this yet. Any other questions on the amendment? I've seen none. Can you have a motion to adopt them? I move that we adopt 2, 3, 4, 2, 3, 4, 2, 4, 2, 3, 4, 2. Mr. Chairman. Senator Sendo will second the motion. We're having an amended bill. We're back on the bill. Motion on the bill. I move that we do pass House Tax and Revenue Committee Substitute for House Bill 2332 as amended. Second by the knock on the wood. Senator Steinborn. Any objection to the adoption of the bill? No, no, no. This is the capital outlay. This is capital outlay. Reoffers. This is new. I'm interested in closet does have. Call the roll. Senator Brandt. Senator Brandt votes. No Senator Compez. Senator Goonzalez. Senator Goonzalez votes. Senator Linear. Has excused. Senator Padilla. Yes. Senator Padilla votes. Yes. Senator Steinborn votes. Yes. Senator Tobias. Is excused. Senator Trigio. Yes. Senator Trigio votes. Yes. Senator Wood. Are excused. Senator Shendo? Yes. Senator Shendo votes. Yes. Yes. Senator Munoz, yes, we have a new pass, 7 and 8 for every day of one in the negative. And thank you, Mr. Chairman. I want to thank the committee for coming back together this way. Thank you very much. Well, it wasn't our fault. It was Council's fault. This happens really once or twice a year. Thank you. We're adjourned.
